metadata.description: Human-labeled calibration dataset for confidence score calibration

samples.subject: 订单取消申请
samples.body: 您好，我想取消订单#12345，因为我不再需要这个产品了。请帮我处理退款，谢谢。
samples.notes: Clear cancellation request with order number

samples.subject: Product inquiry
samples.body: Hi, I'm interested in your laptop models. Can you send me the price list and specifications?

samples.subject: Where is my package?
samples.body: I ordered 2 weeks ago but haven't received anything. Order #67890. What's going on?
samples.notes: Misclassified - this is an exception (delayed delivery) not routine tracking

instructions.how_to_add_samples: Add new samples to the 'samples' array with all required fields
instructions.target_size: 200+ samples across all categories for robust calibration
instructions.labeling_guidelines: Ensure true_category reflects the actual intent, not just keyword matches
